description:
Advances: specled.realized_by

Discovered fixing main@a4bfd3b. When a function's realization intentionally changes: (1) Orchestrator.refresh_and_commit_hashes/3 is gated on has_drift?(raw findings) — severity-independent — so drift blocks the very refresh that would accept the new hash; mix spec.check can never self-heal intentional drift, contrary to what a4bfd3b's commit message assumed. (2) The Spec-Drift: branch_guard_realization_drift=info trailer only downgrades the finding while the carrying commit is inside base..HEAD; once merged (tip of main), Trailer.read sees an empty range and the drift comes back as an error forever. (3) The only working ritual is delete-the-stale-entry-and-let-silent_seed-reseed, which is sanctioned by specled.realized_by.silent_seed but documented nowhere as the acceptance flow. Consider an explicit accept mechanism (e.g. mix spec.check --accept-drift <mfa> or accepting when the run's trailer downgrades the code) plus guide documentation.
title: intentional realization drift has no acceptance path
